headline: A Look At Dollar Tree (DLTR) Valuation As Multi Price Strategy And Earnings Outlook Draw Fresh Attention
summary: Recent commentary around Dollar Tree (DLTR) has centered on its shift to a multi price model, its growing traction with higher income shoppers, and upcoming earnings. See our latest analysis for Dollar Tree. Despite the recent headlines and expectations around the next earnings release, Dollar Tree’s 30 day share price return of an 8.38% decline and year to date share price return of a 12.53% decline sit alongside a 1 year total shareholder return of 69.24%, suggesting recent momentum has...
